case_title: FLORENCE CHANG VS. OWEN A. GILMORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,600.00 FILED BY CHANG, FLORENCE AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, OWEN A. CHANG, JENNIFER H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, FLORENCE AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, OWEN A.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
